_comment: Chocobo (monster) recolor sections. Tiers live in one bin (battle_cyoko_spr.bin) as palettes 0/1/2 (Yellow/Black/Red); the pixel->index assignment is shared across tiers, so this maps all three. Only the Primary Color (body, indices 3-8) is mapped — Feet (9-11) and Eye (15) were dropped since the editor preview crop can't show them to verify. Indices 1,2,12,13,14 are unused/inert. shadeMode is uniformHue for clean single-hue shading.
